<!-- Generated by pipeline Step 13 - do not edit manually -->
<!-- Source: HLD §4 (data model), §7 (contracts), openapi.yaml schemas. Entities are real HLD/API classes only. -->

# Class Diagram — RAG Refinement System

```mermaid
classDiagram
    class Document {
        +str doc_id
        +str content_hash
        +str title
        +int total_pages
        +str domain
        +str tenant_id
        +str residency_region
        +bool fallback_only
        +datetime created_at
    }
    class Section {
        +str section_id
        +str doc_id
        +str title
        +int level
        +int page_start
        +int page_end
        +str summary
        +json pii_flags
    }
    class Chunk {
        +str chunk_id
        +str section_id
        +str doc_id
        +int page
        +str tenant_id
        +vector embedding
    }
    class RouterOutput {
        +RelevantSection[] relevant_sections
        +int[][] page_ranges
        +float[] confidence
        +bool fallback
        +int routing_time_ms
        +str rationale
    }
    class RelevantSection {
        +str section_id
        +str document_id
        +str title
        +int page_start
        +int page_end
        +float confidence
    }
    class Citation {
        +str section_id
        +str section_title
        +int page_start
        +int page_end
    }
    class RoutingSummary {
        +str[] sections
        +float[] confidence
        +bool fallback
        +str rationale
    }
    class AnswerFinalEvent {
        +str query_id
        +str answer
        +Citation[] citations
        +RoutingSummary routing
    }
    class PiiField {
        +str field
        +str location
        +str category
    }

    Document "1" o-- "many" Section : contains
    Section "1" o-- "many" Chunk : owns
    RouterOutput "1" *-- "many" RelevantSection : selects
    RelevantSection ..> Section : refers via section_id
    AnswerFinalEvent "1" *-- "many" Citation : cites
    AnswerFinalEvent "1" *-- "1" RoutingSummary : explains
    Citation ..> Section : page within section
    Document "1" o-- "many" PiiField : DPDP access export
```

> `section_id` is the universal join/filter key across Document -> Section -> Chunk (HLD §4, §7.5). Only Chunk is embedded into Qdrant; Document and Section live in PostgreSQL.
